name: Gun Skill
effect: +1 To-Hit with all ranged weapons.

name: Marksman
effect: Ignores cover penalties at Band 4 and Band 5.

name: Sharpshooter
effect: Aimed shot gives +3 To-Hit instead of +2.

name: Quick Fire
effect: May Shoot as a free action after a Move action once per activation.

name: Ambidextrous
effect: May shoot two sidearms in one Shoot action (resolve both, −1 To-Hit on each).

name: Sniper
effect: Ignores cover penalties at all bands. May target Leaders at Bands 4–5. Required for sniper rifles.

name: Artillerist
effect: May use support and heavy weapons without the −2 point-blank penalty.

name: Aggressive
effect: +1 to Melee rolls; may re-roll a losing Melee result once per game.

name: Swordsman
effect: +3 Melee bonus when using bladed weapons (in addition to training bonus).

name: Martial Arts
effect: Unarmed Melee bonus is +2 instead of −1; may roll Melee twice per combat and use the higher result.

name: Initiative
effect: Always activates first in the round when initiative is tied.

name: Agile
effect: Ignores difficult terrain movement penalties.

name: Dodge
effect: Once per game, re-roll one failed Armour Save.

name: Nerves of Steel
effect: Immune to the Suppressed result on the first hit each game.

name: Constitution
effect: Gains +1 Wound (maximum 3 wounds total).

name: Fortune
effect: Once per game, re-roll any single dice roll before the result is applied.

name: Intuitive
effect: When an enemy moves within 6", make a free 3" reaction move before the enemy completes their action.

name: Leadership
effect: Figures within 5" may re-roll failed Nerve checks. Once per game, rally a Suppressed figure within 5" as a free action.

name: Medic
effect: Once per activation, attempt to stabilise an adjacent Stunned figure (roll 4+ on 1D6). May carry a Digimedic for free.

name: Scout
effect: +3" jet pack jump distance, −1 accident penalty. Reduced concealment range. May use Laser Painter.

name: Grenadier
effect: +2 To-Hit with thrown grenades. +1 in Melee. +1 when checking if troops in cover are injured by grenades.

name: Sapper
effect: +2 to demolition dice rolls. May lay and disarm mines. Required for demolition packs.

name: Gunner
effect: No penalty for firing support weapons. May use Heavy category weapons.

name: Fanatic
effect: Immune to Suppressed results. Will not voluntarily retreat. If no friendly within 6" and unengaged, must advance toward nearest enemy.
